skill.summary: Professional Quantitative Intelligence & DeFi Execution for AI Agents. 10 years of news-price correlation, Enso DeFi super-aggregator (200+ DEXs, 15+ chains)...

latestVersion.changelog:
**Major update: Adds DeFi execution, cross-chain bridging, and secure agent wallets to existing quantitative intelligence features.**

- Integrated Enso Finance super-aggregator: Swap, bridge, yield, and DeFi bundles across 200+ DEXs and 15+ chains.
- Added cross-chain bridging support via Across Protocol.
- Introduced Privy TEE-secured agent wallets for safe DeFi execution.
- Updated homepage and author URLs, expanded tags to cover new DeFi and wallet capabilities.
- Retained quantitative alpha, historical memories, and AI chat features.
- Updated API usage examples and endpoint documentation.
